file(GLOB_RECURSE SRC_FILES *.cpp)
add_npu_library(npu_compiler_vpuipdpu_37XX
    ${SRC_FILES}
    LINK_LIBS
      PUBLIC
        npu_compiler_dialect_config
        npu_compiler_dialect_vpu
        npu_compiler_dialect_vpuipdpu
      PRIVATE
        # force MLIR headers to be generated by proxy-depending on npu_compiler_utils
        # TODO: #-127108
        npu_compiler_utils
)
